statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null || true; venv=''; if [[ ! -z "$VIRTUAL_ENV" ]] && [[ ! -z "$_OLD_VIRTUAL_PATH" ]]; then venv="($(basename "$VIRTUAL_ENV")) "; fi; dir="${cwd/#$HOME/\~}"; if [[ ${#cwd} -gt 65 ]]; then first=$(echo "$cwd" | cut -d'/' -f1-2); last=$(echo "$cwd" | awk -F'/' '{print $(NF-1)"/"$NF}'); dir="${first} ... ${last}"; fi; git_status=''; if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if git --no-optional-locks diff --quiet 2>/dev/null && git --no-optional-locks diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null; then git_status="$(printf '\033[32m')${branch} ✔$(printf '\033[0m')"; else git_status="$(printf '\033[32m')${branch}$(printf '\033[0m') $(printf '\033[31m')✗$(printf '\033[0m')"; fi; fi; printf "${venv}$(printf '\033[1;37m')${dir}$(printf '\033[0m') ${git_status}\n» "
